{{Quote|Just remember that getting to Yavin, is our goal.|[[Tyber Zann]] to [[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="Forces" />}}
The '''Space Battle at Yavin 4''' was an armed search mission organized by [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]] in the wreckage of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|And now, we have the perfect opportunity to test the story, thanks to the Rebels. Alliance forces have destroyed the Imperial Death Star - over Yavin 4. Most Imperial battle stations carry data pods that are to be ejected during emergencies. Perhaps someone thought to follow protocol before the Death Star was destroyed.|Tyber Zann to Urai Fen|<ref name="Forces" />}}
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Crime lord/Legends|Crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]] heard of a rumor involving [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] personal vaults which contained vast amounts of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. While he knew nothing of the locations, Zann believed that the answer could be found in the remains of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] which the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] had [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destroyed]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]].

He believed that someone on the Death Star had followed standard procedures and ejected some [[data pod]]s before the destruction of the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], and ordered his [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] forces to make a pass around Yavin 4.

==The battle==
{{Quote|They have an entire base on Yavin 4 and have nowhere else to go. The Empire will soon send a fleet to retaliate. We must move quickly to find the data pod.|Tyber Zann to Urai Fen|<ref name="Forces" />}}
The Consortium force encountered a Rebel patrol in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] which they quickly destroyed. They then found the first data pod which contained top secret information about discussions between the [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moffs]], which was of no use to Zann.

The flotilla then discovered an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] which was guarded by four [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruisers]], however the Tartan cruisers abandoned the ''Acclamator'' and defected to the Consortium. The ''Acclamator's'' [[Unidentified Acclamator Captain|Captain]] protested, but his ship was subsequently destroyed.

The Consortium then found another data pod which contained the designs for a brand new warship being constructed at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. This warship was the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class dreadnought]] known as [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']].

After dealing with another Rebel confrontation and destroying several missile satellites, Tyber found another data pod. This contained the designs for a new warship called the [[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class Star Destroyer]]. Zann still believed that at least one data pod could be found.

Tyber's forces had to fight off not just another Rebel group, but also multiple pirate units as well, such as [[Rihkxyrk assault fighter]]s and a [[Barloz-class medium freighter/Legends|''Barloz''-class medium freighter]]. These had found the data pod before him, but Tyber Zann managed to steal it just as four [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] arrived.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Based on records of the Emperor's transmission's, I believe the vaults are very real. There are technical plans for new ships and most importantly, construction schedules for the Emperor's new flagship over Kuat.|Tyber Zann to Urai Fen|<ref name="Forces" />}}
The fourth data pod contained the exact information that Zann was looking for, and he found that the locations of the vaults could be accessed from inside the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]; He then moved to the next step of building his criminal empire, and eventually the Consortium constructed an ''Aggressor''-class destroyer.

==Behind the scenes==
The raid appears in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''. It appears in the [[Consortium]] Campaign.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
